activities.title: Arrive at Haneda/Narita Airport
activities.note: Take the train or bus to your accommodation and drop off your luggage

activities.title: Explore Takeshita Street
activities.note: Instagrammable treats, like crepes, tornado potatoes pop “Harajuku Rainbow!

activities.title: Shopping at Cat Street and Kiddy Land
activities.note: Cat Street is a trendy shopping street with a mix of international brands and local boutiques. Kiddy Land is a multi-story toy store with a huge selection of character goods, perfect for picking up unique souvenirs!

activities.title: Lunch at Menchirashi
activities.note: Delicious and affordable pasta dishes in a cozy setting, mind the long lines but it’s worth the wait!

activities.title: Grab Matcha latte from The Matcha Tokyo
Shibuya Scramble
activities.note: One of the busiest pedestrian crossings in the world, a must-see for first-timers in Tokyo!

activities.title: Shopping at Shibuya Parco
activities.note: Pokemon center, Nintendo Store, Jump Shop etc.

activities.title: Dine at Hakata Tempura Takao
activities.note: Delicious tempura fish, prawn, squid, pork and 3 vegetables with Rice, miso soup and three pickles

activities.title: Enjoy a drink in Golden Gai
Breakfast at Tsumugi cafe in Tsukiji
activities.note: Shojin Ryori (Japanese temple cuisine ━ a set menu inspired by Buddhism teaching)

activities.title: Get customized Onitsuka Tiger at RED store
activities.note: Go before the store opens at 11

activities.title: Lunch at 銀座 篝 大手町店
activities.note: Michelin rated cheap eats, easily one of the best ramen restaurant Ginza Kagari Soba

activities.title: Shopping at UNIQLO, GINZA SIX, ITOYA, MUJI, GU, LOFT etc.
Take a pic with Tokyo Tower
Grab Yakitori Kufuraku Ginzasohonten
activities.note: Authentic charcoal-grilled skewers made with Iwate Prefecture's Seiryudori chicken

activities.title: Discover the elegant kimono culture in Asakusa
activities.note: Book the Kimono Rental via Kloop app. Visit Senso-ji Temple wearing a stunning kimono.

activities.title: Explore Nakamise Street and try street food and shop for souvenirs
Walk to LE LABO KYOTO MACHIYA
activities.note: Near the Kamo River, there is a little Japanese courtyard style cafe hidden within a New York-based perfume store

activities.title: Explore Kappabashi Street
activities.note: Known as 'Kitchen Town', high-quality knives to plastic food models.

activities.title: Dinner at Mo Mo Paradise Asakusa
activities.note: Sukiyaki & Shabu Shabu

activities.title: Arrive at Kyoto Station
activities.note: Take the Shinkansen from Tokyo to Kyoto, dont forget to buy the bento box for the train ride!

activities.title: Walk through the red torii gates at Fushimi Inari Taisha Shrine
Take a coffee break at Vermillion Cafe
Lunch at Katsukura Sanjo in downtown Kyoto
activities.note: Excellent pork Tonkatsu, plus, the Sanjo main shop in downtown Kyoto serves tasty crab croquettes and chicken cutlets.

activities.title: Coffee at Starbucks Coffee Kyoto Ninenzaka Yasaka Chaya
Explore the old streets of Gion
Dinner in Okonomiyaki JUJU Kyoto Gion
activities.note: Hidden gem in Gion, delicious okonomiyaki and yakisoba and watch a man with true passion for his craft at work.

activities.title: Enjoy a drink at Beatle momo record Bar
activities.note: A bar with a vinyl record theme, Amazing atmosphere with an incredible vinyl DJ spinning customer requests. Drinks are creative, reservation required.

activities.title: Early morning at Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
Try Kyoto Latte at % ARABICA Arashiyama
Walk through Ryoan-ji's zen rock garden
Lunch at Seigenin
activities.note: Tofu hot pot
